The word "nutmeg" in sports typically refers to a specific move in soccer (or football in many parts of the world). A nutmeg is when a player kicks the ball between an opponent's legs as they attempt to tackle or intercept the ball. It's a show of skill that can be embarrassing for the player who gets nutmegged.
